ops.text: RESOLVED (error-5 papercut, 2026-07-14): synckit 194701e — install now retries the bootout→bootstrap pair on launchd EIO (exit 5) with a doubling backoff (isInFlux classification, ctx-aware sleep, retry/exhaustion/ctx-cancel tests), and a persistent EIO on a session-limited agent names the over-ssh cause. Tag gotcha: v0.15.0 was tagged on the un-merged branch commit (bcdd8ef) so the release gate refused it and the tap never got the binary; module tag left in place (Go proxy had served it — never move a published module tag) and the binary shipped as v0.15.1 from main (61af4b5). Verified live on BOTH Macs: upgrade-in-place `synckitd install` over the running 0.14.0 serve exited 0 (this Mac twice, and on yasyf-home where this papercut's manual bootout+bootstrap remediation was needed this morning). Doctor 8/8 on both.
